content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Book is 74% deployed with 9 CNC positions already held and one working ADANIPOWER BUY still open. Broad market flat on day but sector rotation clear: pharma, FMCG, power, PSU banks showing strength; defensive bid dominates. VIX at 18.6 indicates elevated risk. Priority is managing the existing book and installing proper SL/targets since all positions currently show SL=0.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.00,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat strong (+35% PAT, improving asset quality), PSU bank sector outperforming. Stock at 79, above SMA20/50. Set SL at 74 (below recent swing low, ~6% from entry) and target 88 (R1 extension, ~8% up). R:R ~1.2:1 from CMP but thesis remains intact on sector momentum."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 940.00,
      "new_target": 1080.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Post-results rally on strong Q4 (PAT +19%, GNPA improving). JPMorgan TP 1000 already nearly hit. SL at 940 protects gains below swing, target 1080 below 52w high. Locking in breakeven+ protection."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 118.00,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge position. Gold structurally bullish with Fed easing path and CB buying. SL at 118 (~5%) gives room for normal volatility, target 135 on continued rally."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1590.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Broke out to new 52w high. Nabha acquisition accretive, summer demand tailwind, Q4 May 13. SL at 1590 (below breakout/prior 52w high) locks in position, target 1820 gives room to Rs 2000+ analyst targets."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1340.00,
      "new_target": 1520.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Outstanding Q4: revenue +22.6%, record results, +8% to 52w high. Defensive FMCG rotation strong. SL at 1340 protects against gap-up fade, target 1520 on continued breakout momentum."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 990.00,
      "new_target": 1150.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Audited Q4 results April 25 (2 days). Provisional business update strong (+22.8% deposits, +25.1% advances). Universal bank license catalyst. SL 990 (~5.6%), target 1150. Binary event risk justifies tight SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 640.00,
      "new_target": 760.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "At 52w high with 3.7x volume. Q4 results April 29 (6 days - binary event). Strong Q3 momentum + FDA clean audit. SL at 640 (~6%), target 760 on results move."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2280.00,
      "new_target": 2550.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "FMCG defensive rotation. Q4 results April 28 (5 days - binary). SL at 2280 (~4.8%), target 2550 within analyst range. Rich valuation leaves room but positive sector tape."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 385.00,
      "new_target": 430.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Broke above Rs 400 resistance toward 52w high. Power sector tailwind, Q4 May 15. SL at 385 (below SMA20, ~5%), target 430 aligns with analyst consensus."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY limit at 214 pending from 25+ hours ago. Per order hygiene rules, not stacking another order. Power cluster exposure already high (TORNTPOWER + NTPC + pending ADANIPOWER = >20% of capital). Letting working order stand rather than cancel since thesis intact, but flagging cluster concentration for review."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "AUROPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Buyback catalyst interesting but book already 74% deployed. Pharma exposure adequate via GRANULES. No capacity for new adds."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TRITURBINE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "15.3x volume surge interesting signal but chasing after 20%+ move with book already 74% deployed is poor R:R. Pass - watch for consolidation."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ELECON",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.3,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT collapsed -96% on goodwill impairment. Gap-up appears to be dead cat / short squeeze. Avoid."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "DRREDDY",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.35,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "ANVISA rejection + US tariff overhang + weak peer set. Research agent bearish. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "WHIRLPOOL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.35,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Consumer durables sector weak, stock -27% from 52w high. Research bearish. Skip chasing gap-up."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.00,
      "reasoning": "Down 3.2% but sector catalyst intact. Install SL at 74 to define risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 940.00,
      "reasoning": "Strong post-results move, trail SL below swing low."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 118.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, small drawdown within noise."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1590.00,
      "reasoning": "Breakout above 52w high, lock in gains near breakeven."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1340.00,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 momentum, define risk below entry."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 990.00,
      "reasoning": "Binary event April 25 - tight SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 640.00,
      "reasoning": "Earnings April 29 - maintain position with defined risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2280.00,
      "reasoning": "FMCG defensive rotation, earnings April 28."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 385.00,
      "reasoning": "Broke key resistance, trail SL below SMA20."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "TRITURBINE 15.3x volume notable - watch for consolidation above Rs 540 for potential re-entry. AUROPHARMA buyback floor at 1475 provides setup if pharma rotation extends. PIRAMALFIN/DEEPAKNTR need cooling period before entry - avoid chasing gap-ups.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 74% deployed, approaching max. Power cluster (TORNTPOWER + NTPC + pending ADANIPOWER) is largest concentration risk — monitor and consider canceling ADANIPOWER pending order if fill doesn't happen soon. Multiple binary earnings events next week (AUBANK Apr 25, HINDUNILVR Apr 28, GRANULES Apr 29) — appropriate SLs installed to manage event risk. No new entries today; focus is position management and risk definition since all positions previously had SL=0."
}
